name: Air Source Heat Pump
description: Replace aging gas or electric resistance HVAC with a high-efficiency air source heat pump.
citation_snippet: Air source heat pumps can reduce electricity use for heating by roughly 50% compared with electric resistance heating.

name: Attic Insulation to R-49
description: Bring attic insulation up to the DOE-recommended level for your climate zone and reduce heat loss through the roof.
citation_snippet: Adding insulation in attics, floors, crawl spaces, and accessible basement rim joists is a common way to improve home efficiency.

name: Air Sealing
description: Seal attic bypasses, penetrations, and common leakage points before or alongside insulation work.
citation_snippet: Air sealing reduces drafts and heat loss by closing gaps around penetrations, joints, and other leakage points.

name: Heat Pump Water Heater
description: Replace an aging electric or gas water heater with a high-efficiency heat pump water heater.
citation_snippet: Heat pump water heaters move heat rather than generating it directly, making them more efficient than standard electric resistance models.
